targets.rawSql: SELECT MAX((payload->>'pm2_5')::float) AS max_pm25 FROM sensor_readings WHERE sensor_type='air_quality' AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes'
SELECT AVG((payload->>'pm2_5')::float) AS avg_pm25 FROM sensor_readings WHERE sensor_type='air_quality' AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sensor_id) FROM sensor_readings WHERE sensor_type='air_quality' AND (payload->>'pm2_5')::float >= 35 AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes'

SELECT SUM((payload->>'power_kw')::float) AS total_kw FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (sensor_id) sensor_id, payload FROM sensor_readings WHERE sensor_type='energy_meter' AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' ORDER BY sensor_id, timestamp DESC) latest
SELECT timestamp AS time, sensor_id AS metric, (payload->>'pm2_5')::float AS value FROM sensor_readings WHERE sensor_type='air_quality' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp AS time, sensor_id AS metric, (payload->>'power_kw')::float AS value FROM sensor_readings WHERE sensor_type='energy_meter' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT sensor_id, (payload->>'occupied_spots')::float / (payload->>'total_spots')::float AS occupancy FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (sensor_id) sensor_id, payload FROM sensor_readings WHERE sensor_type='car_park' AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' ORDER BY sensor_id, timestamp DESC) latest ORDER BY occupancy DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT sensor_id, (payload->>'queue_length')::int AS queue FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (sensor_id) sensor_id, payload FROM sensor_readings WHERE sensor_type='traffic_light' AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' ORDER BY sensor_id, timestamp DESC) latest ORDER BY queue DESC LIMIT 10
